# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Run custom build scripts
        env:
          BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR: /path/to/build/scripts
          DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS_DIR: /path/to/deployment/commands
        run: |
          ls ${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}
          for script in $(ls ${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}); do
            ./${script}
          done

      - name: Run deployment commands
        env:
          DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS_DIR: /path/to/deployment/commands
        run: |
          ls ${DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS_DIR}
          for command in $(ls ${DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS_DIR}); do
            ./${command}
          done
